# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Security Group for EC2 instances with secure access controls'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC ID where the security group will be created
  
  SSHAllowedCIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block allowed for SSH access (e.g., your office IP or VPN range)
    Default: '10.0.0.0/8'
    AllowedPattern: '^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR block
  
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Description: Environment name
    Default: development
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production

Resources:
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub '${Environment}-ec2-security-group'
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instances with restricted access'
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHAllowedCIDR
          Description: 'SSH access from authorized network only'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
          Description: 'HTTP access from anywhere'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIpv6: '::/0'
          Description: 'HTTP access from anywhere (IPv6)'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
          Description: 'HTTPS access from anywhere'
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIpv6: '::/0'
          Description: 'HTTPS access from anywhere (IPv6)'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'
          Description: 'Allow all outbound traffic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${Environment}-ec2-sg'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: 'Security Group ID'
    Value: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'
  
  SecurityGroupName:
    Description: 'Security Group Name'
    Value: !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
